response.justification: Despite 15+ years of broad engineering experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable AI or cloud platform strategy leadership, with no evidence of building AI-powered products, advising on AI strategy, or influencing cloud product roadmaps — core requirements for this director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and systems engineering experience across languages and domains
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical leadership
Strong documentation, teaching, and workshop facilitation skills
concerns: No demonstrated AI or machine learning product development experience
Lacks cloud platform strategy or enterprise AI adoption advisory experience
Role focus is on AI/Cloud strategy, but resume emphasizes generalist tooling and infrastructure
